description.S: Hezbollah claimed 23 attacks targeting Israeli forces and positions in northern Israel and southern Lebanon on March 15–16, including rocket and drone attacks along both sides of the Israel-Lebanon border. Hezbollah claimed a rocket barrage and drone squadron targeted Nahariya; Israeli media confirmed a direct impact on a structure in Nahariya on March 16.
